product: Scoped personal access tokens are now generally available
tagline: You can now scope personal access tokens (PATs) to specific API operations, restricting tokens to only the permissions you specify.
what_it_does: You can now scope personal access tokens (PATs) to specific API operations, restricting tokens to only the permissions you specify. For a complete list of available scopes, see API scopes. To learn more, see Authenticate with Databricks personal access tokens (legacy).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now scope personal access tokens (PATs) to specific API operations, restricting tokens to only the permissions you specify. For a complete list of available scopes, see API scopes.

capabilities.title: FIPS 140 validated encryption modules
capabilities.desc: FIPS 140 validated encryption modules Automatic cluster updates, ensuring clusters have the latest updates by periodically…

key_takeaway: You can now scope personal access tokens (PATs) to specific API operations, restricting tokens to only the permissions you specify.
